findings: Depth Guard explicitly defined and bounded to 3 levels with can_launch:false at depth 3
50 Squad Leads x 5 Workers = 250 contract encoded but not absolute - swarm_scale manifest can override
Partial/failure handling present: success requires exactly 50 SLs and 250 workers; fewer = partial
Premium model policy explicit with named pool and banned list
Commander may use task tool; workers forbidden via exact leaf-node block in prompts
